subcodes.first_line: O my Lord! O Thou Who hast illumined all existence with the light of the All-Praised, Who hast dawned upon all horizons with the effulgent rays of Thy Covenant, and Who dost pour forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا منور الوجود بالنور المحمود و المشرق علی الافاق بانوار المیثاق و الفائض
